summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Projeto Alegria CMS system. All backend APIs and frontend CMS pages are working correctly. Successfully tested site settings, gallery, projects, testimonials, and contact messages management.
passed_tests: PUT /api/settings updates site settings (admin auth required)
GET /api/public/settings returns public settings without auth
Landing page loads with all sections (hero, about, classes, testimonials, contact)
Dashboard home displays statistics and quick actions
CMS menu navigation works for all new items (Editar Site, Galeria, Projetos, Depoimentos, Mensagens)
Site Settings page loads with tabbed interface (Hero/Banner, Sobre, Contato, Redes Sociais)
Gallery page shows empty state with add button
Projects page shows empty state with add button
Testimonials page displays existing testimonials with edit/delete options
Messages page shows contact messages with status management
Public contact form submission works correctly
Contact form success message displays properly
